languages.text: Кабели, наполненные энергией, гудят и плюются голубыми искрами.

traits.locale_text: Кабели, наполненные энергией, гудят и плюются голубыми искрами.

languages.text: Cables thrumming with energy, humming and spitting blue sparks.
languages.original_text: Кабели, наполненные энергией, гудят и плюются голубыми искрами.

traits.locale_text: Cables thrumming with energy, humming and spitting blue sparks.
Cables thrumming with energy, humming and spitting blue sparks.
Cables thrumming with energy, humming and spitting blue sparks.

languages.text: 线缆里奔涌着能量，嗡嗡作响，不时炸开蓝色电火花。
languages.original_text: Cables thrumming with energy, humming and spitting blue sparks.

traits.locale_text: 线缆里奔涌着能量，嗡嗡作响，不时炸开蓝色电火花。

languages.text: Cables que vibran con energía, zumbando y escupiendo chispas azules.
languages.original_text: Cables thrumming with energy, humming and spitting blue sparks.

traits.locale_text: Cables que vibran con energía, zumbando y escupiendo chispas azules.

languages.text: Une énergie colossale vrombit à travers les câbles, qui émettent une note sourde et vibrante en crachotant des étincelles bleutées.
languages.original_text: Cables thrumming with energy, humming and spitting blue sparks.

traits.locale_text: Une énergie colossale vrombit à travers les câbles, qui émettent une note sourde et vibrante en crachotant des étincelles bleutées.

languages.text: Kablolar enerjiyle vızıldıyor, uğulduyor ve mavi kıvılcımlar saçıyor.
languages.original_text: Cables thrumming with energy, humming and spitting blue sparks.

traits.locale_text: Kablolar enerjiyle vızıldıyor, uğulduyor ve mavi kıvılcımlar saçıyor.

languages.text: Mit Energie geladene Kabel summen und sprühen blaue Funken.
languages.original_text: Cables thrumming with energy, humming and spitting blue sparks.

traits.locale_text: Mit Energie geladene Kabel summen und sprühen blaue Funken.

languages.text: エネルギーを帯びたケーブルが、唸りながら青い火花を吐き出す。
languages.original_text: Cables thrumming with energy, humming and spitting blue sparks.

traits.locale_text: エネルギーを帯びたケーブルが、唸りながら青い火花を吐き出す。
